prompt: Write Python: `RateLimiter(max_calls: int, period: float)` with method `allow() -> bool`. Returns True if the call is within the rate limit (max_calls per period seconds), False otherwise. Use a sliding window.

tests.code:
import time
rl = RateLimiter(3, 1.0)
assert rl.allow() == True
assert rl.allow() == True
assert rl.allow() == True
assert rl.allow() == False

rl = RateLimiter(1, 0.1)
assert rl.allow() == True
assert rl.allow() == False
time.sleep(0.15)
assert rl.allow() == True
